system.description:
Money in the Auran Empire takes the form of coins of precious metal. The copper piece is the most widely-used coin. A copper piece (cp) purchases a loaf of bread or three pints of cheap ale. 10cp make a silver piece (sp). 10sp or 100cp make a gold piece (gp). These three coins are the most widely used in the civilized world. Less commonly seen are electrum pieces (ep), each worth 5sp, and platinum pieces (pp), each worth 5gp.

Coins carried on your person affect your encumbrance.
Coins banked have no effect.
When calculating encumbrance, 1000 coins equal 1 stone.
